query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_variants,
  COUNT(materialColorId) as variants_with_color,
  COUNT(supplierId) as variants_with_supplier,
  COUNT(customerId) as variants_with_customer,
  SUM(CASE WHEN materialColorId IS NOT NULL AND supplierId IS NOT NULL AND customerId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fully_configured
FROM product_variants;
